channel.title: Railway on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Railway on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily

item.title: IRFC Assistant Manager Vacancy 2026
item.description: Indian Railway Finance Corporation (IRFC) has released the official notification for Assistant (NE5) and Assistant Manager (Finance) posts under Recruitment 2026. A total of 23 vacancies are available for eligible candidates. The online application process started on 04 April 2026 and the last date to apply is 01 May 2026. Candidates must have a B.Com degree with required qualifications such as CA/CMA or MBA (Finance). The selection process includes a Computer Based Test (CBT), Document Verification, and Interview (for Manager post). This is a great opportunity to get a high-paying PSU job with salary up to ₹16 LPA.
